shortDescription.en: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon utilise une capacité du même type que lui, le bonus de puissance qu'elle reçoit est encore plus important que normalement.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5×.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon utilise une capacité du même type que lui, le bonus de puissance qu'elle reçoit est encore plus important que normalement.

shortDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal moves into flying moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Vol.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

longDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into flying-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Vol.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

shortDescription.en: Damages the attacker for 1/4 its max HP when knocked out by a contact move.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est mis K.O. par une attaque directe,\nil inflige des dégâts à l’attaquant avant de s’évanouir.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon is knocked out by a move that makes contact, the move's user takes 1/4 its maximum HP in damage.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est mis K.O. par une attaque directe,\nil inflige des dégâts à l’attaquant avant de s’évanouir.

shortDescription.en: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
shortDescription.fr: Annule tous les effets de la météo.

longDescription.en:
While this Pokémon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

This ability functions identically to cloud nine.
longDescription.fr: Annule tous les effets de la météo.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens moves to 1.3× their power when moving last.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités du Pokémon\ns’il attaque en dernier.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves have 1.3× their power when it moves last in a turn.

future sight and doom desire are unaffected.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités du Pokémon\ns’il attaque en dernier.

shortDescription.en: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon subit un coup critique, il entre\ndans une colère noire qui augmente son Attaque\nau maximum.

longDescription.en:
Whenever this Pokémon receives a critical hit, its Attack rises to the maximum of 6 stages.

This ability will still take effect if the critical hit is received by a substitute.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon subit un coup critique, il entre\ndans une colère noire qui augmente son Attaque\nau maximum.

shortDescription.en: When the Pokémon's HP drops below half, Anger Shell lowers its Defense and Special Defense but its Attack, Special Attack and Speed are raised.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon enrage s’il a moins de la moitié de ses PV\naprès avoir subi une attaque. Sa Déf. et sa Déf. Spé.\nbaissent, et son Atq., son Atq. Spé. et sa Vit. augmentent.

longDescription.en: When an attack causes its HP to drop to half or less, the Pokémon gets angry. This lowers its Defense and Sp. Def stats but boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon enrage s’il a moins de la moitié de ses PV\naprès avoir subi une attaque. Sa Déf. et sa Déf. Spé.\nbaissent, et son Atq., son Atq. Spé. et sa Vit. augmentent.

shortDescription.en: Notifies all trainers upon entering battle if an opponent has a super-effective move, self destruct, explosion, or a one-hit KO move.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon devine si l'adversaire connaît une capacité dangereuse pour lui.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle, if one of its opponents has a move that is super effective against it, self destruct, explosion, or a one-hit knockout move, all participating trainers are notified.

The move itself is not revealed; only that there is such a move.  Moves that inflict typeless damage, such as future sight, and moves of variable type, such as hidden power, count as their listed types.  counter, metal burst, mirror coat, and one-hit KO moves to which this Pokémon is immune do not trigger this ability.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon devine si l'adversaire connaît une capacité dangereuse pour lui.

shortDescription.en: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.  Eluded by flying-types and Pokémon in the air.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche l'adversaire de quitter le terrain.

longDescription.en:
While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.  flying-type Pokémon and Pokémon in the air, e.g. due to levitate or magnet rise, are unaffected.

Pokémon with run away can still flee.  Pokémon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.
longDescription.fr: Empêche l'adversaire de quitter le terrain.

shortDescription.en: Prevents the opponent from using any moves that have priority, such as Quick Attack.
shortDescription.fr: Une étrange queue recouvre la tête du Pokémon,\nce qui empêche ce dernier et ses alliés d’être visés\npar une capacité prioritaire.

longDescription.en: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon’s head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.
longDescription.fr: Une étrange queue recouvre la tête du Pokémon,\nce qui empêche ce dernier et ses alliés d’être visés\npar une capacité prioritaire.

shortDescription.en: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
shortDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon et ses alliés des effets limitant\nle libre arbitre.

longDescription.en: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
longDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon et ses alliés des effets limitant\nle libre arbitre.

shortDescription.fr: Les talents Tension de Sylveroy et Sombre Ruade\nde Spectreval sont cumulés.

longDescription.fr: Les talents Tension de Sylveroy et Sombre Ruade\nde Spectreval sont cumulés.

shortDescription.fr: Les talents Tension de Sylveroy et Sombre Ruade de Spectreval sont cumulés.

longDescription.fr: Les talents Tension de Sylveroy et Sombre Ruade de Spectreval sont cumulés.

shortDescription.en: Makes dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types.
shortDescription.fr: Inverse l’effet des talents « Aura » afin que ceux-ci\nbaissent la puissance des capacités affectées au lieu\nde l’augmenter.

longDescription.en: While this Pokémon is on the field, dark aura and fairy aura weaken moves of their respective types to 2/3 their power, rather than strengthening them.
longDescription.fr: Inverse l’effet des talents « Aura » afin que ceux-ci\nbaissent la puissance des capacités affectées au lieu\nde l’augmenter.

shortDescription.en: Damages sleeping opponents for 1/8 their max HP after each turn.
shortDescription.fr: Inflige des dégâts aux ennemis endormis.

longDescription.en: Opposing Pokémon take 1/8 of their maximum HP in damage after each turn while they are asleep.
longDescription.fr: Inflige des dégâts aux ennemis endormis.

shortDescription.en: If the Pokémon is not holding an item, it will fetch the Poké Ball from the first failed throw of the battle.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon ne tient aucun objet, il ramassera\nla Poké Ball lors du premier lancer raté du combat.

longDescription.en: At any time after the first Poké Ball is thrown and fails to catch a Pokémon, at the end of a turn, if a Pokémon with Ball Fetch is on the field and not holding another item, it will pick up the same type of ball as the first one thrown.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon ne tient aucun objet, il ramassera\nla Poké Ball lors du premier lancer raté du combat.

shortDescription.en: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités spéciales des alliés.

longDescription.en: Ally Pokémon's moves have their power increased to 1.3×.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités spéciales des alliés.

shortDescription.en: Protects against critical hits.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé des coups critiques\npar une solide carapace.

longDescription.en:
Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon.

This ability functions identically to shell armor.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé des coups critiques\npar une solide carapace.

shortDescription.en: Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.
shortDescription.fr: En battant un ennemi, ce Pokémon renforce ses liens\navec son Dresseur, ce qui augmente son Attaque,\nson Attaque Spéciale et sa Vitesse.

longDescription.en:
Transforms this Pokémon into Ash-Greninja after fainting an opponent.  Water Shuriken's power is 20 and always hits three times.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Greninja.
longDescription.fr: En battant un ennemi, ce Pokémon renforce ses liens\navec son Dresseur, ce qui augmente son Attaque,\nson Attaque Spéciale et sa Vitesse.

shortDescription.en: Lowers Special Defense of all Pokémon except itself.
shortDescription.fr: Le pouvoir des perles qui appellent le fléau affaiblit\nla Défense Spéciale de tous les autres Pokémon.

longDescription.en: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous beads lowers the Sp. Def stats of all Pokémon except itself.
longDescription.fr: Le pouvoir des perles qui appellent le fléau affaiblit\nla Défense Spéciale de tous les autres Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la stat la plus élevée du Pokémon\nquand il met K.O. un autre Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Raises this Pokémon's highest stat by one stage when it faints another Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la stat la plus élevée du Pokémon\nquand il met K.O. un autre Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Raises this Pokémon's Special Attack by one stage every time its HP drops below half.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon lorsque\nses PV tombent à la moitié à cause d’une attaque\nde l’adversaire.

longDescription.en: Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move that causes its HP to drop below 50%, its Special Attack rises by one stage.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon lorsque\nses PV tombent à la moitié à cause d’une attaque\nde l’adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Protects against Defense drops.
shortDescription.fr: Protège des effets qui baissent la Défense.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Defense cannot be lowered by other Pokémon.

This Pokémon can still be passed negative Defense modifiers through heart swap or guard swap.
longDescription.fr: Protège des effets qui baissent la Défense.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Feu du Pokémon quand il a perdu une certaine quantité de PV.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its fire-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Feu du Pokémon quand il a perdu une certaine quantité de PV.

shortDescription.en: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
shortDescription.fr: Protège de certaines capacités lançant des projectiles\ncomme des bombes et des balles.

longDescription.en: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
longDescription.fr: Protège de certaines capacités lançant des projectiles\ncomme des bombes et des balles.

shortDescription.en: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon récupère des PV lorsqu’il consomme\nn’importe quelle Baie en plus de bénéficier de\nses effets habituels.

longDescription.en: Restores HP upon eating a Berry, in addition to the Berry's effect.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon récupère des PV lorsqu’il consomme\nn’importe quelle Baie en plus de bénéficier de\nses effets habituels.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O., il émet\nun hennissement glaçant, ce qui augmente son Attaque.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a chilling neigh, which boosts its Attack stat.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O., il émet\nun hennissement glaçant, ce qui augmente son Attaque.

shortDescription.en: Doubles Speed during strong sunlight.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon s'il y a du soleil.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during strong sunlight.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon s'il y a du soleil.

shortDescription.en: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche les stats du Pokémon de baisser à cause du talent ou d'une capacité de l'adversaire.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon.

This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis.  This Pokémon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through guard swap, heart swap, or power swap.

This ability functions identically to white smoke in battle.
longDescription.fr: Empêche les stats du Pokémon de baisser à cause du talent ou d'une capacité de l'adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Negates all effects of weather, but does not prevent the weather itself.
shortDescription.fr: Annule tous les effets liés à la météo.

longDescription.en:
While this Pokémon is in battle, weather can still be in play, but will not have any of its effects.

This ability functions identically to air lock.
longDescription.fr: Annule tous les effets liés à la météo.

shortDescription.en: Changes type to match when hit by a damaging move.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est touché par une capacité,\nil prend le type de celle-ci.

longDescription.en:
Whenever this Pokémon takes damage from a move, the Pokémon's type changes to match the move.

If the Pokémon has two types, both are overridden.  The Pokémon must directly take damage; for example, moves blocked by a substitute will not trigger this ability, nor will moves that deal damage indirectly, such as spikes.

This ability takes effect on only the last hit of a multiple-hit attack.

In Pokémon Colosseum and XD: Gale of Darkness, this ability does not take effect on Shadow-type moves.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est touché par une capacité,\nil prend le type de celle-ci.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon always  acts as though it were Asleep.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon rêve en permanence et ne se réveille\njamais. Il est capable d’attaquer normalement\ntout en dormant.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon always acts as though it were Asleep.  It cannot be given another status ailment; it's unaffected by yawn; it can use sleep talk; and so on.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon rêve en permanence et ne se réveille\njamais. Il est capable d’attaquer normalement\ntout en dormant.

shortDescription.en: Goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field.
shortDescription.fr: Si un Oyacata allié est sur le terrain quand ce Pokémon\nrejoint le combat, ce dernier entre dans sa bouche et\ndevient son commandant.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it goes inside the mouth of an ally Dondozo if one is on the field. The Pokémon then issues commands from there.
longDescription.fr: Si un Oyacata allié est sur le terrain quand ce Pokémon\nrejoint le combat, ce dernier entre dans sa bouche et\ndevient son commandant.

shortDescription.en: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup l’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon\nquand ses stats ont été baissées par l’adversaire.

longDescription.en: Raises Special Attack by two stages upon having any stat lowered.
longDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup l’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon\nquand ses stats ont été baissées par l’adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.3×.
shortDescription.fr: Les yeux à facettes du Pokémon augmentent la Précision de ses capacités.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves have 1.3× their accuracy.

This ability has no effect on the one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold).

Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, the chance of a wild Pokémon holding a particular item is raised from 50%, 5%, or 1% to 60%, 20%, or 5%, respectively.
longDescription.fr: Les yeux à facettes du Pokémon augmentent la Précision de ses capacités.

shortDescription.en: Inverts stat changes.
shortDescription.fr: Inverse les changements de stats : les augmentations\nde stats se transforment en baisses, et vice-versa.

longDescription.en: Whenever this Pokémon's stats would be raised, they are instead lowered by the same amount, and vice versa.
longDescription.fr: Inverse les changements de stats : les augmentations\nde stats se transforment en baisses, et vice-versa.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon can inflict poison on Poison and Steel Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Permet d’empoisonner les Pokémon de type Acier\nou Poison.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's moves and item ignore the usual immunity of Poison and Steel Pokémon when attempting to inflict poison.
longDescription.fr: Permet d’empoisonner les Pokémon de type Acier\nou Poison.

shortDescription.en: Copies ally's stat changes on entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon entre sur le terrain, il copie\nles changements de stats de son allié.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it copies an ally’s stat changes.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon entre sur le terrain, il copie\nles changements de stats de son allié.

shortDescription.en: When Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une attaque,\nil dissémine des aigrettes qui diminuent la Vitesse\nde tout le monde, sauf la sienne.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon is hit by an attack, it scatters cotton fluff around and lowers the Speed stats of all Pokémon except itself.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une attaque,\nil dissémine des aigrettes qui diminuent la Vitesse\nde tout le monde, sauf la sienne.

shortDescription.en: Causes the Pokémon to reuse an already consumed Berry at the end of the next turn.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon mange une Baie, il la régurgite\nà la fin du tour suivant et la mange une nouvelle fois.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon mange une Baie, il la régurgite\nà la fin du tour suivant et la mange une nouvelle fois.

shortDescription.en: Resets all stat changes upon entering battlefield.
shortDescription.fr: Quand il entre au combat, le Pokémon répand\nune substance qui annule les changements de stats\nde ses alliés.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.
longDescription.fr: Quand il entre au combat, le Pokémon répand\nune substance qui annule les changements de stats\nde ses alliés.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of Disabling any move that hits the Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une capacité adverse,\nil inflige parfois Entrave sur celle-ci.

longDescription.en: Moves that hit this Pokémon have a 30% chance of being Disabled afterward.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une capacité adverse,\nil inflige parfois Entrave sur celle-ci.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Peut séduire l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being infatuated.

Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, any wild Pokémon whose species can be either gender has a 2/3 chance of being set to the opposite gender, and a 1/3 chance of having a random gender as usual.
longDescription.fr: Peut séduire l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Prevents self destruct, explosion, and aftermath from working while the Pokémon is in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon augmente l'humidité de l'air, ce qui empêche tous les Pokémon d'utiliser des capacités explosives telles que Destruction.

longDescription.en: While this Pokémon is in battle, self destruct and explosion will fail and aftermath will not take effect.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon augmente l'humidité de l'air, ce qui empêche tous les Pokémon d'utiliser des capacités explosives telles que Destruction.

shortDescription.en: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
shortDescription.fr: Si n’importe quel Pokémon utilise une capacité dansante,\nle Pokémon utilise immédiatement cette danse lui aussi.

longDescription.en: Whenever another Pokémon uses a dance move, this Pokémon will use the same move immediately afterwards.
longDescription.fr: Si n’importe quel Pokémon utilise une capacité dansante,\nle Pokémon utilise immédiatement cette danse lui aussi.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens dark moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Ténèbres\nde tous les Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Strengthens dark moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Ténèbres\nde tous les Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Defense in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Défense du Pokémon la première fois\nqu’il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Defense stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Défense du Pokémon la première fois\nqu’il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
shortDescription.fr: L’adversaire est abasourdi par le Pokémon,\nce qui l’empêche de viser ce dernier et\nses alliés avec une capacité prioritaire.

longDescription.en: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.
longDescription.fr: L’adversaire est abasourdi par le Pokémon,\nce qui l’empêche de viser ce dernier et\nses alliés avec une capacité prioritaire.

shortDescription.en: Halves Attack and Special Attack at 50% max HP or less.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon devient défaitiste quand ses PV tombent\nà la moitié, et son Attaque et son Attaque Spéciale\nsont divisées par deux.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's Attack and Special Attack are halved when it has half its HP or less.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon devient défaitiste quand ses PV tombent\nà la moitié, et son Attaque et son Attaque Spéciale\nsont divisées par deux.

shortDescription.en: Raises Attack two stages upon having any stat lowered.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup l'Attaque du Pokémon quand ses stats sont baissées par l'adversaire.

longDescription.en:
When any of this Pokémon's stats are lowered, its Attack rises by two stages.

If multiple stats are lowered at once, this ability takes effect with each stat lowered.
longDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup l'Attaque du Pokémon quand ses stats sont baissées par l'adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Creates a mysterious air current, which cannot be replaced and causes moves to never be super effective against Flying Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour annuler les faiblesses\ndu type Vol.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes a mysterious air current.  A mysterious air current causes moves to not be super effective against Flying; they do neutral damage instead.  anticipation and stealth rock are not affected.

The mysterious air current ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of desolate land and primordial sea.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effect of a mysterious air current, but will not allow the weather to be changed.
longDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour annuler les faiblesses\ndu type Vol.

shortDescription.en: Creates extremely harsh sunlight, which has all the properties of Sunny Day, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Water moves to fail.
shortDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour neutraliser\nles attaques de type Eau.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes extremely harsh sunlight.  Extremely harsh sunlight has all the properties of sunny day and also causes damaging Water moves to fail.

Extremely harsh sunlight ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of delta stream and primordial sea.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effects of extremely harsh sunlight, including allowing Water moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.
longDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour neutraliser\nles attaques de type Eau.

shortDescription.en: Prevents the first instance of battle damage.
shortDescription.fr: Le déguisement qui recouvre le corps du Pokémon\nest capable de le protéger d’une attaque.

longDescription.en:
If this Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and takes damage from a move, it switches to its Busted Form and the damage is prevented.  Other effects are not prevented.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Mimikyu.
longDescription.fr: Le déguisement qui recouvre le corps du Pokémon\nest capable de le protéger d’une attaque.

shortDescription.en: Raises the attack stat corresponding to the opponents' weaker defense one stage upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon compare la Défense et la Défense Spéciale\nde l’adversaire et, en fonction de la stat la plus basse,\nil augmente sa propre Attaque ou Attaque Spéciale.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle, its Attack or Special Attack, whichever corresponds to its opponents' weaker total defensive stat, rises one stage.  In the event of a tie, Special Attack is raised.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during a battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon compare la Défense et la Défense Spéciale\nde l’adversaire et, en fonction de la stat la plus basse,\nil augmente sa propre Attaque ou Attaque Spéciale.

shortDescription.en: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

shortDescription.en: Powers up Dragon-type moves.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Dragon.

longDescription.en: Increases the power of Dragon-type moves used by this Pokémon by 50%.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Dragon.

shortDescription.en: Summons rain that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque la pluie quand il entre au combat.

longDescription.en:
The weather changes to rain when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless replaced by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokémon with this ability, drought, sand stream, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokémon will stay.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque la pluie quand il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Summons strong sunlight that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque le soleil quand il entre au combat.

longDescription.en:
The weather changes to strong sunlight when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokémon with this ability, drizzle, sand stream, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokémon will stay.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque le soleil quand il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Causes 1/8 max HP in damage each turn during strong sunlight, but heals for 1/8 max HP during rain.  Increases damage from fire moves to 1.25×, but absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le soleil brille, le Pokémon perd des PV et subit plus de dégâts des capacités Feu, mais il regagne des PV lorsqu'il pleut ou s'il est touché par une capacité Eau.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage after each turn during strong sunlight, but it heals for 1/8 of its HP each turn during rain.  This Pokémon takes 1.25× as much damage from fire-type moves, but whenever a water move hits it, it heals for 1/4 its maximum HP instead.
longDescription.fr: Quand le soleil brille, le Pokémon perd des PV et subit plus de dégâts des capacités Feu, mais il regagne des PV lorsqu'il pleut ou s'il est touché par une capacité Eau.

shortDescription.en: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon se réveille deux fois plus rapidement que les autres.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's remaining sleep turn count falls by 2 rather than 1.

If this Pokémon's sleep counter is at 1, it will fall to 0 and then the Pokémon will wake up.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon se réveille deux fois plus rapidement que les autres.

shortDescription.en: Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Sol,\nil regagne des PV au lieu de subir des dégâts.

longDescription.en: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Sol,\nil regagne des PV au lieu de subir des dégâts.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of inflcting either paralysis, poison, or sleep on attacking Pokémon on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Peut paralyser, empoisonner ou endormir l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being paralyzed, poisoned, or put to sleep, chosen at random.

Nothing is done to compensate if the move's user is immune to one of these ailments; there is simply a lower chance that the move's user will be affected.
longDescription.fr: Peut paralyser, empoisonner ou endormir l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Electric Terrain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ électrifié au moment\noù il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to electric terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ électrifié au moment\noù il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: When hit by an attack, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon subit des dégâts, il se charge\nen électricité.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon subit des dégâts, il se charge\nen électricité.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon évite les situations inutilement\ndangereuses. Quand ses PV tombent à la moitié,\nil se réfugie dans sa Poké Ball.

longDescription.en: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon évite les situations inutilement\ndangereuses. Quand ses PV tombent à la moitié,\nil se réfugie dans sa Poké Ball.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens fairy moves to 1.33× their power for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Fée\nde tous les Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Strengthens fairy moves for all friendly and opposing Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Fée\nde tous les Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
shortDescription.fr: Diminue la puissance des attaques super efficaces\nsubies.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon takes 0.75× as much damage from moves that are super effective against it.

This ability functions identically to solid rock.
longDescription.fr: Diminue la puissance des attaques super efficaces\nsubies.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Peut brûler l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being burned.

Overworld: If any Pokémon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly.  This effect does not stack if multiple Pokémon have this ability or magma armor.
longDescription.fr: Peut brûler l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when burned.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités spéciales\nquand le Pokémon est brûlé.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack when burned.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités spéciales\nquand le Pokémon est brûlé.

shortDescription.en: Protects against fire moves.  Once one has been blocked, the Pokémon's own Fire moves inflict 1.5× damage until it leaves battle.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Feu, il absorbe la chaleur pour renforcer ses propres capacités Feu.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is immune to fire-type moves.  Once this Pokémon has been hit by a Fire move, its own Fire moves will inflict 1.5× as much damage until it leaves battle.

This ability has no effect while the Pokémon is frozen.  The Fire damage bonus is retained even if the Pokémon is frozen and thawed or the ability is lost or disabled.  Fire moves will ignore this Pokémon's substitute.  This ability takes effect even on non-damaging moves, i.e. will o wisp.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Feu, il absorbe la chaleur pour renforcer ses propres capacités Feu.

shortDescription.en: Increases friendly Pokémon's Attack and Special Defense to 1.5× during strong sunlight.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque et la Défense Spéciale du Pokémon\net de ses alliés lorsque le soleil brille.

longDescription.en:
Friendly Pokémon have 1.5× their Attack and Special Defense during strong sunlight if any friendly Pokémon has this ability.

Unlike forecast, multitype, and zen mode, this ability is not tied to its Pokémon's form change; cherrim will switch between its forms even if it loses this ability.  As such, this ability also works if obtained by a Pokémon other than Cherrim.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque et la Défense Spéciale du Pokémon\net de ses alliés lorsque le soleil brille.

shortDescription.en: Protects friendly grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche les alliés de type Plante de subir des baisses\nde stats et des altérations de statut.

longDescription.en: Protects friendly grass Pokémon from having their stats lowered by other Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Empêche les alliés de type Plante de subir des baisses\nde stats et des altérations de statut.

shortDescription.en: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
shortDescription.fr: Divise par deux les dégâts des attaques directes\nsubies par le Pokémon, mais double les dégâts\ndes capacités de type Feu.

longDescription.en: Damage from contact moves is halved.  Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
longDescription.fr: Divise par deux les dégâts des attaques directes\nsubies par le Pokémon, mais double les dégâts\ndes capacités de type Feu.

shortDescription.en: Changes castform's type and form to match the weather.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type Eau, Feu ou Glace\nen fonction de la météo.

longDescription.en:
During rain, strong sunlight, or hail, this Pokémon's type changes to water, fire, or ice, respectively, and its form changes to match.

This ability has no effect for any Pokémon other than castform.

If the weather ends or becomes anything that does not trigger this ability, or a Pokémon with air lock or cloud nine enters battle, this Pokémon's type and form revert to their default.  If this ability is lost or disabled, this Pokémon cannot change its current type and form until it regains its ability.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type Eau, Feu ou Glace\nen fonction de la météo.

shortDescription.en: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Révèle l’une des capacités de l’adversaire quand\nle combat commence.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals the move with the highest base power known by any opposing Pokémon to all participating trainers.

In the event of a tie, one is chosen at random.

Moves without a listed base power are assigned one as follows:

Power | Moves
----: | -----
  160 | One-hit KO moves: fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold
  120 | Counter moves: counter, metal burst, and mirror coat
   80 | Variable power or set damage: crush grip, dragon rage, electro ball, endeavor, final gambit, flail, frustration, grass knot, gyro ball, heat crash, heavy slam, hidden power, low kick, natural gift, night shade, psywave, return, reversal, seismic toss, sonic boom, trump card, and wring out
    0 | Any such move not listed
longDescription.fr: Révèle l’une des capacités de l’adversaire quand\nle combat commence.

shortDescription.en: Decreases all direct damage taken by friendly Pokémon to 0.75×.
shortDescription.fr: Diminue les dégâts subis par les alliés.

longDescription.en:
All friendly Pokémon take 0.75× as much direct damage from moves while this Pokémon is in battle.

This effect stacks if multiple allied Pokémon have it.
longDescription.fr: Diminue les dégâts subis par les alliés.

shortDescription.en: Reveals an opponent's held item upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Permet de connaître l'objet tenu par l'ennemi quand le combat commence.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals an opposing Pokémon's held item to all participating trainers.

In a double battle, if one opponent has an item, this Pokémon will Frisk that Pokémon; if both have an item, it will Frisk one at random.
longDescription.fr: Permet de connaître l'objet tenu par l'ennemi quand le combat commence.

shortDescription.en: Other Pokémon cannot lower this Pokémon's stats.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche les stats du Pokémon de baisser à cause\ndu talent ou d’une capacité de l’adversaire.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or abilities.  This effect only applies to normal stat modifications and not more exotic effects such as topsy turvy or power swap.

This Ability is not bypassed by mold breaker, teravolt, or turboblaze.
longDescription.fr: Empêche les stats du Pokémon de baisser à cause\ndu talent ou d’une capacité de l’adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Halves damage from physical attacks.
shortDescription.fr: Divise par deux les dégâts des capacités physiques\nsubies par le Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Halves damage from physical attacks.
longDescription.fr: Divise par deux les dégâts des capacités physiques\nsubies par le Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
shortDescription.fr: Quand les PV du Pokémon sont au maximum,\nses capacités de type Vol sont prioritaires.

longDescription.en: Raises flying moves' priority by one stage.
longDescription.fr: Quand les PV du Pokémon sont au maximum,\nses capacités de type Vol sont prioritaires.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon's Normal moves are Electric and have their power increased to 1.2×.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type\nÉlectrik. Leur puissance augmente légèrement.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon uses a Normal moves, that move is Electric its power is 1.2×.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type\nÉlectrik. Leur puissance augmente légèrement.

shortDescription.en: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon tient une Baie à manger en cas de PV bas, il la mange dès qu'il a perdu la moitié de ses PV.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon tient une Baie à manger en cas de PV bas, il la mange dès qu'il a perdu la moitié de ses PV.

shortDescription.en: Gives immunity to status moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le corps en or pur et robuste du Pokémon l’immunise\ncontre les capacités de statut des autres Pokémon.

longDescription.en: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon’s status moves.
longDescription.fr: Le corps en or pur et robuste du Pokémon l’immunise\ncontre les capacités de statut des autres Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Baisse la Vitesse de l’attaquant lorsque le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en: Lowers attacking Pokémon's Speed by one stage on contact.
longDescription.fr: Baisse la Vitesse de l’attaquant lorsque le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque, mais empêche d’utiliser\ntoute autre capacité que celle utilisée en premier\npar le Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat but only allows the use of the first selected move.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque, mais empêche d’utiliser\ntoute autre capacité que celle utilisée en premier\npar le Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Défense du Pokémon si un champ herbu\nest actif.

longDescription.en: Boosts Defense while grassy terrain is in effect.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Défense du Pokémon si un champ herbu\nest actif.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Grassy Terrain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ herbu au moment\noù il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to grassy terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ herbu au moment\noù il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Special Attack after knocking out a Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O., il émet\nun hennissement terrifiant qui augmente\nson Attaque Spéciale.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon knocks out a target, it utters a terrifying neigh, which boosts its Sp. Atk stat.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O., il émet\nun hennissement terrifiant qui augmente\nson Attaque Spéciale.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Attack if intimidated, and prevents being forced to switch out.
shortDescription.fr: L’Attaque du Pokémon augmente s’il subit l’effet du\ntalent Intimidation. Les capacités ou objets qui font\nchanger de Pokémon n’ont aucun effet sur lui.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if intimidated. Moves and items that would force the Pokémon to switch out also fail to work.
longDescription.fr: L’Attaque du Pokémon augmente s’il subit l’effet du\ntalent Intimidation. Les capacités ou objets qui font\nchanger de Pokémon n’ont aucun effet sur lui.

shortDescription.en: If a Cramorant with Gulp Missile uses Surf or Dive, it catches prey and changes its form depending on its remaining HP.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon utilise Surf ou Plongée, il revient\navec une proie. Lorsqu’il subit des dégâts par la suite,\nil attaque en recrachant sa proie.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon uses Surf or Dive, it will come back with prey. When it takes damage, it will spit out the prey to attack.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon utilise Surf ou Plongée, il revient\navec une proie. Lorsqu’il subit des dégâts par la suite,\nil attaque en recrachant sa proie.

shortDescription.en: Increases Attack to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l'Attaque du Pokémon s'il est affecté par une altération de statut.

longDescription.en:
Whenever this Pokémon is asleep, burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, it has 1.5× its Attack.  This Pokémon is not affected by the usual Attack cut from a burn.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l'Attaque du Pokémon s'il est affecté par une altération de statut.

shortDescription.en: Creates an Electric Terrain when entering battle, and boosts Special Attack while active.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ électrifié quand il rejoint\nle combat. Une machine du futur fait monter son Attaque\nSpéciale si un champ électrifié est actif.

longDescription.en: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle. The futuristic engine within the Pokémon also boosts its Sp. Atk stat on Electric Terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ électrifié quand il rejoint\nle combat. Une machine du futur fait monter son Attaque\nSpéciale si un champ électrifié est actif.

shortDescription.en: Has a 50% chance of restoring a used Berry after each turn if the Pokémon has held no items in the meantime.
shortDescription.fr: Permet de réutiliser une même Baie plusieurs fois.

longDescription.en: After each turn, if the last item this Pokémon consumed was a Berry and it is not currently holding an item, it has a 50% chance of regaining that Berry, or a 100% chance during strong sunlight.
longDescription.fr: Permet de réutiliser une même Baie plusieurs fois.

shortDescription.en: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.
shortDescription.fr: Soigne parfois une altération de statut d’un allié proche.

longDescription.en: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
longDescription.fr: Soigne parfois une altération de statut d’un allié proche.

shortDescription.en: Halves damage from fire moves and burns.
shortDescription.fr: Diminue de moitié les dégâts infligés au Pokémon\npar les capacités de type Feu.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon takes half as much damage from fire-type moves and burns.
longDescription.fr: Diminue de moitié les dégâts infligés au Pokémon\npar les capacités de type Feu.

shortDescription.en: Doubles the Pokémon's weight.
shortDescription.fr: Double le poids du Pokémon.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon has double the usual weight for its species.
longDescription.fr: Double le poids du Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: The Pokémon may pick up honey after battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon peut parfois trouver du Miel après un combat.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon has a chance of picking up honey after each battle.  This chance starts at 5% and rises another 5% after every tenth level: 5% from level 1–10, 10% from 11–20, and so on, up to 50% from 91–100.

This ability is checked after the battle ends, at which point any temporary ability changes have worn off.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon peut parfois trouver du Miel après un combat.

shortDescription.en: When a Pokémon with Hospitality enters a battle, it restores HP for an ally by 25%.
shortDescription.fr: Quand il rejoint le combat, ce Pokémon est aux petits\nsoins avec son allié et restaure quelques PV.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP.
longDescription.fr: Quand il rejoint le combat, ce Pokémon est aux petits\nsoins avec son allié et restaure quelques PV.

shortDescription.en: Doubles Attack in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Double la puissance des attaques physiques.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Attack is doubled while in battle.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

This ability functions identically to pure power.
longDescription.fr: Double la puissance des attaques physiques.

shortDescription.en: Causes Morpeko to change its form each turn, alternating between Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode
shortDescription.fr: À la fin de chaque tour, le Pokémon alterne\nentre ses formes Mode Rassasié et Mode Affamé.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of every turn.
longDescription.fr: À la fin de chaque tour, le Pokémon alterne\nentre ses formes Mode Rassasié et Mode Affamé.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.
shortDescription.fr: Améliore l'Attaque du Pokémon, mais diminue la Précision.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's physical moves do 1.5× as much regular damage, but have 0.8× their usual accuracy.

Special moves are unaffected.  Moves that do set damage, such as seismic toss, have their accuracy affected, but not their damage.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
longDescription.fr: Améliore l'Attaque du Pokémon, mais diminue la Précision.

shortDescription.en: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
shortDescription.fr: Soigne les altérations de statut du Pokémon quand il pleut.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
longDescription.fr: Soigne les altérations de statut du Pokémon quand il pleut.

shortDescription.en: Prevents Attack from being lowered by other Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est armé de puissantes pinces qui font sa fierté et empêchent son Attaque d'être baissée par l'adversaire.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Attack cannot be lowered by other Pokémon.

This ability does not prevent any Attack losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Attack cut from a burn.  This Pokémon can still be passed negative Attack modifiers through heart swap or power swap.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est armé de puissantes pinces qui font sa fierté et empêchent son Attaque d'être baissée par l'adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
shortDescription.fr: Régénère peu à peu les PV du Pokémon quand il neige.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.
longDescription.fr: Régénère peu à peu les PV du Pokémon quand il neige.

shortDescription.en: The Pokémon’s ice head can take a physical attack as a substitute, but the attack also changes the Pokémon’s appearance. The ice will be restored when it snows.
shortDescription.fr: Le glaçon sur sa tête encaisse les attaques physiques\nà la place du Pokémon, mais sa destruction modifie\nson apparence. Le glaçon se reforme quand il neige.

longDescription.en: When an Eiscue that's in its Ice Face form is hit by a physical move, it takes no damage and changes into its Noice Face form. If a hailstorm or snowstorm begins while Eiscue is in its Noice Face form, or if it is sent out in its Noice Face form during hail, it will immediately revert to its Ice Face form.
longDescription.fr: Le glaçon sur sa tête encaisse les attaques physiques\nà la place du Pokémon, mais sa destruction modifie\nson apparence. Le glaçon se reforme quand il neige.

shortDescription.en: Halves damage from Special moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé par des écailles de glace.\nLes dégâts qu’il subit par des capacités spéciales\nsont divisés par deux.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon is protected by ice scales, which halve the damage taken from special moves.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé par des écailles de glace.\nLes dégâts qu’il subit par des capacités spéciales\nsont divisés par deux.

shortDescription.en: Doubles the wild encounter rate.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon illumine les alentours, ce qui empêche\nsa Précision de baisser.

longDescription.en:
Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.

This ability has no effect in battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon illumine les alentours, ce qui empêche\nsa Précision de baisser.

shortDescription.en: Takes the appearance of the last conscious party Pokémon upon being sent out until hit by a damaging move.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend l’apparence du dernier membre\nde l’équipe pour tromper l’adversaire.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon, upon being sent out, appears to have the species, nickname, and Poké Ball of the last Pokémon in the party that is able to battle.  This illusion breaks upon being hit by a damaging move.

Other damage, e.g. from weather or spikes, does not break the illusion, nor does damage done to a substitute.

If the party order becomes temporarily shuffled around as Pokémon are switched out in battle, this ability chooses the last Pokémon according to that shuffled order.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend l’apparence du dernier membre\nde l’équipe pour tromper l’adversaire.

shortDescription.en: Prevents poison.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est naturellement immunisé\ncontre toute forme de poison.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be poisoned.  This includes bad poison.

If a Pokémon is poisoned and acquires this ability, its poison is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est naturellement immunisé\ncontre toute forme de poison.

shortDescription.en: Transforms upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend l’apparence du Pokémon adverse.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon transforms into a random opponent upon entering battle.  This effect is identical to the move transform.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend l’apparence du Pokémon adverse.

shortDescription.en: Bypasses light screen, reflect, and safeguard.
shortDescription.fr: Traverse les barrières et les clones adverses\npour attaquer directement.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's moves ignore light screen, reflect, and safeguard.
longDescription.fr: Traverse les barrières et les clones adverses\npour attaquer directement.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon inflige à l’adversaire l’ayant mis K.O.\ndes dégâts égaux au nombre de PV qu’il lui restait\navant le coup de grâce.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon faints from an opponent's move, that opponent takes damage equal to the HP this Pokémon had remaining.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon inflige à l’adversaire l’ayant mis K.O.\ndes dégâts égaux au nombre de PV qu’il lui restait\navant le coup de grâce.

shortDescription.en: Prevents flinching.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon a un mental à toute épreuve qui empêche les attaques ennemies de lui faire peur. Il est aussi immunisé contre le talent Intimidation.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon cannot flinch.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon a un mental à toute épreuve qui empêche les attaques ennemies de lui faire peur. Il est aussi immunisé contre le talent Intimidation.

shortDescription.en: Prevents sleep.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est incapable de dormir.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be asleep.

This causes rest to fail altogether.  If a Pokémon is asleep and acquires this ability, it will immediately wake up; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

This ability functions identically to vital spirit in battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est incapable de dormir.

shortDescription.en: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon rugit lorsqu'il arrive au combat, ce qui intimide l'ennemi et baisse son Attaque.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle, the opponent's Attack is lowered by one stage.  In a double battle, both opponents are affected.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during a battle, but will not take effect again if lost and reobtained without leaving battle.

This ability has no effect on an opponent that has a substitute.

Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, any random encounter with a Pokémon five or more levels lower than it has a 50% chance of being skipped.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon rugit lorsqu'il arrive au combat, ce qui intimide l'ennemi et baisse son Attaque.

shortDescription.en: Boosts Attack in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque du Pokémon la première fois\nqu’il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat the first time the Pokémon enters a battle.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l’Attaque du Pokémon la première fois\nqu’il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Inflige des dégâts à l’attaquant lorsque le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

This ability functions identically to rough skin.
longDescription.fr: Inflige des dégâts à l’attaquant lorsque le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens punch-based moves to 1.2× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités coups de poing.

longDescription.en:
Moves flagged as being punch-based have 1.2× their base power for this Pokémon.

sucker punch is not flagged as punch-based; its original, Japanese name only means "surprise attack".
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités coups de poing.

shortDescription.en: Raises Attack one stage upon taking damage from a dark move.
shortDescription.fr: Réveille la noblesse du Pokémon lorsqu’il subit\nune attaque de type Ténèbres, ce qui augmente\nson Attaque.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a dark-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage.

The move is not negated in any way.
longDescription.fr: Réveille la noblesse du Pokémon lorsqu’il subit\nune attaque de type Ténèbres, ce qui augmente\nson Attaque.

shortDescription.en: Prevents accuracy from being lowered.
shortDescription.fr: Les yeux perçants du Pokémon empêchent sa Précision de baisser.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot have its accuracy lowered.

This ability does not prevent any accuracy losses other than stat modifiers, such as the accuracy cut from fog; nor does it prevent other Pokémon's evasion from making this Pokémon's moves less accurate.  This Pokémon can still be passed negative accuracy modifiers through heart swap.

Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, any random encounter with a Pokémon five or more levels lower than it has a 50% chance of being skipped.
longDescription.fr: Les yeux perçants du Pokémon empêchent sa Précision de baisser.

shortDescription.en: Prevents the Pokémon from using its held item in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ne peut utiliser aucun objet tenu.

longDescription.en:
In battle, this Pokémon cannot use its held item, nor will the item have any passive effect on the battle, positive or negative.  This Pokémon also cannot use fling.

The Speed cut from the iron ball and the effort items (the macho brace, power weight, power bracer, power belt, power lens, power band, and power anklet) is unaffected.  Items that do not directly affect the battle, such as the exp share, the amulet coin, or the soothe bell, work as usual.  All held items work as usual out of battle.

Other moves that use the held item, such as natural gift and switcheroo, work as usual.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ne peut utiliser aucun objet tenu.

shortDescription.en: Protects against major status ailments during strong sunlight.
shortDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon contre les altérations de statut quand le soleil brille.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be given a major status ailment during strong sunlight.

This ability does not heal prior status ailments.  rest will fail altogether with this ability in effect.  yawn will immediately fail if used on this Pokémon during strong sunlight, and an already-used Yawn will fail if the weather turns to strong sunlight in the meantime.
longDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon contre les altérations de statut quand le soleil brille.

shortDescription.en: Evades ground moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon flotte, ce qui l'immunise contre les capacités de type Sol.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is immune to ground-type moves, spikes, toxic spikes, and arena trap.

This ability is disabled during gravity or ingrain, or while holding an iron ball.  This ability is not disabled during roost.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon flotte, ce qui l'immunise contre les capacités de type Sol.

shortDescription.en: Libero changes the Pokémon's type to that of its previously used attack.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type de la capacité qu’il utilise.\nCe talent ne peut se déclencher qu’une fois par entrée\nau combat du Pokémon.

longDescription.en: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s about to use. This works only once each time the Pokémon enters battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type de la capacité qu’il utilise.\nCe talent ne peut se déclencher qu’une fois par entrée\nau combat du Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Halves the Pokémon's weight.
shortDescription.fr: Divise par deux le poids du Pokémon.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon has half the usual weight for its species.
longDescription.fr: Divise par deux le poids du Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Redirects single-target electric moves to this Pokémon where possible.  Absorbs Electric moves, raising Special Attack one stage.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon détourne sur lui les capacités\nde type Électrik et les neutralise, tout en\naugmentant son Attaque Spéciale.

longDescription.en:
All other Pokémon's single-target electric-type moves are redirected to this Pokémon if it is an eligible target.  Other Pokémon's Electric moves raise this Pokémon's Special Attack one stage, negating any other effect on it, and cannot miss it.

If the move's intended target also has this ability, the move is not redirected.  When multiple Pokémon with this ability are possible targets for redirection, the move is redirected to the one with the highest Speed stat, or, in the case of a tie, to a random tied Pokémon.  follow me takes precedence over this ability.

If the Pokémon is a ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves, its immunity prevents the Special Attack boost.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon détourne sur lui les capacités\nde type Électrik et les neutralise, tout en\naugmentant son Attaque Spéciale.

shortDescription.en: Prevents paralysis.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon s'est suffisamment échauffé, ce qui l'immunise contre la paralysie.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be paralyzed.

If a Pokémon is paralyzed and acquires this ability, its paralysis is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon s'est suffisamment échauffé, ce qui l'immunise contre la paralysie.

shortDescription.en: Contact changes the attacker's Ability to Lingering Aroma.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe, le talent\nde l’attaquant est remplacé par Odeur Tenace.

longDescription.en: Contact with the Pokémon changes the attacker’s Ability to Lingering Aroma.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe, le talent\nde l’attaquant est remplacé par Odeur Tenace.

shortDescription.en: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon suinte un liquide toxique nauséabond qui blesse tous ceux qui tentent de voler ses PV.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a Pokémon would heal after hitting this Pokémon with a leeching move like absorb, it instead loses as many HP as it would usually gain.

dream eater is unaffected.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon suinte un liquide toxique nauséabond qui blesse tous ceux qui tentent de voler ses PV.

shortDescription.en: Sound-based moves become Water-type.
shortDescription.fr: Toutes les attaques sonores du Pokémon prennent\nle type Eau.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon uses a move that is sound-based, that move's type is Water.
longDescription.fr: Toutes les attaques sonores du Pokémon prennent\nle type Eau.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon's moves do not make contact.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est capable d’utiliser toutes ses capacités\nsans entrer en contact direct avec sa cible.

longDescription.en: A move used by this Pokémon will not make contact.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est capable d’utiliser toutes ses capacités\nsans entrer en contact direct avec sa cible.

shortDescription.en: Reflects most non-damaging moves back at their user.
shortDescription.fr: Annule les effets des capacités de statut subies\npar le Pokémon et les retourne à l’envoyeur.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon is targeted by a move flagged as being reflectable, the move is redirected to its user.

All reflectable moves are non-damaging, and most non-damaging moves that target other Pokémon are reflectable.

A move reflected by this ability or magic coat cannot be reflected back.
longDescription.fr: Annule les effets des capacités de statut subies\npar le Pokémon et les retourne à l’envoyeur.

shortDescription.en: Protects against damage not directly caused by a move.
shortDescription.fr: Seules les attaques peuvent blesser le Pokémon.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is immune to damage not directly caused by a move.

For example, this Pokémon takes no damage from from weather, recoil, status ailments, or spikes, but it still suffers from the Attack cut when burned, and a life orb will still power up this Pokémon's moves without damaging it.  Anything that directly depends on such damage will also not happen; for example, leech seed will neither hurt this Pokémon nor heal the opponent, and Pokémon with a jaboca berry or rowap berry will not consume the berry when hit by this Pokémon.

The following are unaffected: struggle, pain split (whether used by or against this Pokémon), belly drum, substitute, curse, moves that knock the user out, and damage from confusion.

This Pokémon will neither lose nor regain HP if it drains HP from a Pokémon with liquid ooze.

If this Pokémon is badly poisoned, the poison counter is still increased each turn; if the Pokémon loses this ability, it will begin taking as much damage as it would be if it had been taking increasing damage each turn.
longDescription.fr: Seules les attaques peuvent blesser le Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités volent aussi l’objet tenu par la cible.

longDescription.en: Steals the target's held item when the bearer uses a damaging move.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités volent aussi l’objet tenu par la cible.

shortDescription.en: Prevents freezing.
shortDescription.fr: Le magma qui recouvre le corps du Pokémon le protège\ncontre le gel.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be frozen.

If a Pokémon is frozen and acquires this ability, it will immediately thaw out; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

Overworld: If any Pokémon in the party has this ability, each egg in the party has its hatch counter decreased by 2 (rather than 1) each step cycle, making eggs hatch roughly twice as quickly.  This effect does not stack if multiple Pokémon have this ability or flame body.
longDescription.fr: Le magma qui recouvre le corps du Pokémon le protège\ncontre le gel.

shortDescription.en: Prevents steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.
shortDescription.fr: Attire les Pokémon Acier grâce à un champ magnétique, ce qui les empêche de quitter le terrain.

longDescription.en:
While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing steel-type Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.

Pokémon with run away can still flee.  Pokémon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, Steel-type Pokémon have a higher encounter rate.
longDescription.fr: Attire les Pokémon Acier grâce à un champ magnétique, ce qui les empêche de quitter le terrain.

shortDescription.en: Increases Defense to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
shortDescription.fr: Les écailles mystérieuses du Pokémon réagissent\naux altérations de statut en augmentant sa Défense.

longDescription.en:
Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Defense.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.
longDescription.fr: Les écailles mystérieuses du Pokémon réagissent\naux altérations de statut en augmentant sa Défense.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités qui projettent\nune aura.

longDescription.en: Strengthens aura and pulse moves to 1.5× their power.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités qui projettent\nune aura.

shortDescription.en: The Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

longDescription.en: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon attaque un adversaire empoisonné,\nle coup est forcément critique.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's moves critical hit against poisoned targets.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon attaque un adversaire empoisonné,\nle coup est forcément critique.

shortDescription.en: Changes type depending on the terrain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon adopte le même type que le terrain\nlorsqu’un champ est actif.

longDescription.en: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon adopte le même type que le terrain\nlorsqu’un champ est actif.

shortDescription.en: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ignore les changements d’Esquive des cibles\net peut toucher les Pokémon Spectre avec des capacités\nNormal ou Combat. Sa Précision ne peut pas baisser.

longDescription.en: Mind's Eye enables the Pokémon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokémon with damage-dealing Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It also prevents other Pokémon from lowering the Pokémon's accuracy and ignores changes to the opponents' evasion.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ignore les changements d’Esquive des cibles\net peut toucher les Pokémon Spectre avec des capacités\nNormal ou Combat. Sa Précision ne peut pas baisser.

shortDescription.en: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has plus or minus.
shortDescription.fr: L’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon augmente\nsi un Pokémon allié a le talent Moins ou Plus.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack if any friendly Pokémon has plus or minus.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.  If either ability is disabled by gastro acid, both lose their effect.
longDescription.fr: L’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon augmente\nsi un Pokémon allié a le talent Moins ou Plus.

shortDescription.en: Reflects any stat-lowering effects.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon renvoie les effets réducteurs de stats\nqu’il reçoit.

longDescription.en: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon renvoie les effets réducteurs de stats\nqu’il reçoit.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Misty Terrain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ brumeux au moment\noù il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to misty terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ brumeux au moment\noù il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent a move.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ignore les talents adverses qui auraient un effet sur ses capacités.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.

For example, this Pokémon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokémon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.

Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.  For example, cursed body only affects potential future uses of the move, while liquid ooze and shadow tag can only hinder a move's effect on the user.  This ablity cannot ignore type or form changes granted by abilities, for example color change or forecast; nor effects that were caused by abilities but are no longer tied to an ability, such as the rain from drizzle.  This ability cannot ignore multitype at all.

An ability ignored by this ability is only nullified while the move is being used.  For example, this Pokémon's moves can paralyze a Pokémon with limber, but Limber will activate and heal the paralysis immediately thereafter, and this Pokémon's spikes are not affected by this ability after they have been placed.

When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.

This ability functions identically to teravolt and turboblaze.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ignore les talents adverses qui auraient un effet sur ses capacités.

shortDescription.en: Raises a random stat two stages and lowers another one stage after each turn.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup une stat du Pokémon\net en baisse une autre au hasard à chaque tour.

longDescription.en:
After each turn, one of this Pokémon's stats at random rises two stages, and another falls one stage.

If a stat is already at 6 or -6 stages, it will not be chosen to be increased or decreased, respectively.
longDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup une stat du Pokémon\net en baisse une autre au hasard à chaque tour.

shortDescription.en: Absorbs electric moves, raising Speed one stage.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type\nÉlectrik, il ne subit aucun dégât et sa Vitesse augmente.

longDescription.en:
Whenever an electric-type move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.

This ability will not take effect if this Pokémon is immune to Electric moves.  Electric moves will ignore this Pokémon's substitute.

This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. thunder wave.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type\nÉlectrik, il ne subit aucun dégât et sa Vitesse augmente.

shortDescription.en: Raises Attack one stage upon KOing a Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O.,\nsa confiance en lui ne connaît plus de limite\net son Attaque augmente.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Attack rises one stage upon knocking out another Pokémon, even a friendly Pokémon.

This ability does not take effect when the Pokémon indirectly causes another Pokémon to faint, e.g. through poison or spikes.

If this Pokémon knocks out a Pokémon with mummy, the former's ability will change without taking effect.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon met un ennemi K.O.,\nsa confiance en lui ne connaît plus de limite\net son Attaque augmente.

shortDescription.en: Halves damage taken from full HP.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon subit moins de dégâts quand ses PV\nsont au maximum.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon takes half as much damage when it is hit having full HP.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon subit moins de dégâts quand ses PV\nsont au maximum.

shortDescription.en: Changes arceus's type and form to match its held Plate.
shortDescription.fr: Modifie le type du Pokémon en fonction de la plaque\nqu’il tient.

longDescription.en:
If this Pokémon is holding an elemental Plate, its type and form change to match the Plate.

This Pokémon's held item, whether or not it is a Plate, cannot be taken by covet or thief, nor removed by knock off, nor traded by switcheroo or trick.  Covet, Thief, and Knock Off still inflict damage against this Pokémon.  Unlike with sticky hold, this Pokémon cannot use fling, Switcheroo, or Trick to lose its item itself, nor gain an item through Switcheroo or Trick if it does not have one.

This ability has no effect for any Pokémon other than arceus.  This ability cannot be traded with skill swap, nor copied with role play or trace, nor disabled with gastro acid, nor changed with worry seed.  This Pokémon cannot use Skill Swap or Role Play to lose its ability itself.  mold breaker cannot ignore this ability.

If a Pokémon Transforms into an Arceus with this ability, it will Transform into Arceus's default, normal-type form.  If the Transforming Pokémon is holding a Plate, this ability will then activate and change the Pokémon into the corresponding form.
longDescription.fr: Modifie le type du Pokémon en fonction de la plaque\nqu’il tient.

shortDescription.en: Changes attacking Pokémon's abilities to Mummy on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe, le talent\nde l’attaquant est remplacé par Momie.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a contact move hits this Pokémon, the attacking Pokémon's ability changes to Mummy.

multitype is unaffected.  If a Pokémon with moxie knocks this Pokémon out, the former's ability will change without taking effect.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe, le talent\nde l’attaquant est remplacé par Momie.

shortDescription.en: Status moves go last, but are not affected by the opponent's ability.
