shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon agit toujours plus lentement quand il utilise\nune capacité de statut, mais il ignore les talents adverses.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon will always act more slowly when using status moves, but these moves will be unimpeded by the Ability of the target.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon agit toujours plus lentement quand il utilise\nune capacité de statut, mais il ignore les talents adverses.

shortDescription.en: Cures any major status ailment upon switching out.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon soigne ses altérations de statut en quittant le combat.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment when it is switched out for another Pokémon.

If this ability is acquired during battle, the Pokémon is cured upon leaving battle before losing the temporary ability.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon soigne ses altérations de statut en quittant le combat.

shortDescription.en: Increases super-effective damage dealt to 1.25×.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente encore plus la puissance des attaques\nsuper efficaces.

longDescription.en: Increases super-effective damage dealt to 1.25×.
longDescription.fr: Augmente encore plus la puissance des attaques\nsuper efficaces.

shortDescription.en: Neutralizes abilities of all Pokémon in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Si un Pokémon avec Gaz Inhibiteur est sur le terrain,\nles effets des talents de tous les autres Pokémon ne\ns’activent pas ou sont neutralisés.

longDescription.en: While the Pokémon is in the battle, the effects of all other Pokémon’s Abilities will be nullified or will not be triggered.
longDescription.fr: Si un Pokémon avec Gaz Inhibiteur est sur le terrain,\nles effets des talents de tous les autres Pokémon ne\ns’activent pas ou sont neutralisés.

shortDescription.en: Ensures all moves used by and against the Pokémon hit.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités du Pokémon touchent leur cible à coup sûr, mais les capacités de l'ennemi le touchent aussi à coup sûr.

longDescription.en:
Moves used by or against this Pokémon never miss.

One-hit KO moves are unaffected.  Moves affected by this ability can hit Pokémon during the preparation turn of moves like dig or fly.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is doubled.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités du Pokémon touchent leur cible à coup sûr, mais les capacités de l'ennemi le touchent aussi à coup sûr.

shortDescription.en: Makes the Pokémon's moves all act normal-type.
shortDescription.fr: Toutes les capacités du Pokémon deviennent\nde type Normal, quel que soit leur type original.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves all act as if they were normal-type.

Moves that inflict typeless damage do so as usual.  Moves of variable type, such as hidden power, are affected.  They otherwise work as usual, however; weather ball, for example, is always forced to be Normal, but it still has doubled power and looks different during weather.

As thunder wave is prevented by immunities, unlike most non-damaging moves, it does not affect ghost-type Pokémon under the effect of this ability.
longDescription.fr: Toutes les capacités du Pokémon deviennent\nde type Normal, quel que soit leur type original.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

shortDescription.en: Prevents infatuation and protects against captivate.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est un grand benêt, ce qui l'immunise contre l'attraction, la provocation ou l'intimidation.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to captivate.

If a Pokémon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est un grand benêt, ce qui l'immunise contre l'attraction, la provocation ou l'intimidation.

shortDescription.en: Copies stat boosts by the opponent.
shortDescription.fr: Quand les stats de l’ennemi augmentent, le Pokémon\nen profite pour augmenter ses stats de la même manière.

longDescription.en: If an opponent’s stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.
longDescription.fr: Quand les stats de l’ennemi augmentent, le Pokémon\nen profite pour augmenter ses stats de la même manière.

shortDescription.en: Turns the sunlight harsh when entering battle, and boosts Attack while active.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque le soleil quand il rejoint le combat.\nQuand le soleil brille, une pulsation primitive augmente\nson Attaque.

longDescription.en: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle. The ancient pulse thrumming through the Pokémon also boosts its Attack stat in harsh sunlight.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque le soleil quand il rejoint le combat.\nQuand le soleil brille, une pulsation primitive augmente\nson Attaque.

shortDescription.en: Protects against damage from weather.
shortDescription.fr: Protège des dégâts occasionnés par les tempêtes\nde sable, ainsi que des effets des capacités\nqui libèrent de la poudre et des spores.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon does not take damage from weather.
longDescription.fr: Protège des dégâts occasionnés par les tempêtes\nde sable, ainsi que des effets des capacités\nqui libèrent de la poudre et des spores.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens grass moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Plante du Pokémon quand il a perdu une certaine quantité de PV.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon has 1/3 or less of its HP remaining, its grass-type moves inflict 1.5× as much regular damage.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Plante du Pokémon quand il a perdu une certaine quantité de PV.

shortDescription.en: Prevents confusion.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon vit sa vie à son propre rythme, ce qui l'immunise contre la confusion et l'intimidation.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be confused.

If a Pokémon is confused and acquires this ability, its confusion will immediately be healed.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon vit sa vie à son propre rythme, ce qui l'immunise contre la confusion et l'intimidation.

shortDescription.en: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.
shortDescription.fr: La mère et son petit unissent leurs forces pour\nattaquer deux fois d’affilée.

longDescription.en: Lets the bearer hit twice with damaging moves.  The second hit has half power.
longDescription.fr: La mère et son petit unissent leurs forces pour\nattaquer deux fois d’affilée.

shortDescription.en: Prevents the Pokémon and its allies from being poisoned.
shortDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon et ses alliés contre toutes\nles altérations de statut liées à l’empoisonnement.

longDescription.en: Prevents the Pokémon and its teammates from being poisoned. It also cures teammates of poisoning when it enters the battlefield.
longDescription.fr: Protège le Pokémon et ses alliés contre toutes\nles altérations de statut liées à l’empoisonnement.

shortDescription.en: When hit by a move that makes direct contact, the Pokémon and the attacker will faint after three turns unless they switch out of battle.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est directement touché par\nune capacité, l’assaillant et lui tomberont K.O. dans trois\ntours, à moins qu’ils ne soient remplacés entre temps.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon with Perish Body is hit with a contact move, both the attacker and the Pokémon with Perish Body will faint in three turns.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est directement touché par\nune capacité, l’assaillant et lui tomberont K.O. dans trois\ntours, à moins qu’ils ne soient remplacés entre temps.

shortDescription.en: Steals attacking Pokémon's held items on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Vole l’objet que tient l’attaquant quand le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, if it does not have a held item, it steals the attacker's held item.

This Pokémon cannot steal upon being knocked out.  It can steal if the attacker has a substitute, but cannot steal when its own Substitute is hit.  If a move hits multiple times, only the last hit triggers this ability.  If this Pokémon is wild, it cannot steal from a trained Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Vole l’objet que tient l’attaquant quand le Pokémon\nsubit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items.  May also pick up an item after battle.
shortDescription.fr: Permet parfois au Pokémon de ramasser les objets\nque d’autres Pokémon ont utilisés. Il lui arrive aussi\nd’en trouver hors des combats.

longDescription.en:
At the end of each turn, if another Pokémon consumed or Flung a held item that turn, this Pokémon picks up the item if it is not already holding one.  After each battle, this Pokémon has a 10% chance of picking up an item if it is not already holding one.

The air balloon and eject button cannot be picked up.

The items that may be found vary by game, and, since Pokémon Emerald, by the Pokémon's level.  This ability is checked after the battle ends, at which point any temporary ability changes have worn off.
longDescription.fr: Permet parfois au Pokémon de ramasser les objets\nque d’autres Pokémon ont utilisés. Il lui arrive aussi\nd’en trouver hors des combats.

shortDescription.en: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

shortDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal moves into fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Fée.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

longDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into fairy moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Fée.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

shortDescription.en: Increases Special Attack to 1.5× when a friendly Pokémon has plus or minus.
shortDescription.fr: L’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon augmente\nsi un Pokémon allié a le talent Moins ou Plus.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon has 1.5× its Special Attack if any friendly Pokémon has plus or minus.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.  If either ability is disabled by gastro acid, both lose their effect.
longDescription.fr: L’Attaque Spéciale du Pokémon augmente\nsi un Pokémon allié a le talent Moins ou Plus.

shortDescription.en: Heals for 1/8 max HP after each turn when poisoned in place of damage.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est empoisonné, il regagne des PV\nau lieu d’en perdre.

longDescription.en: If this Pokémon is poisoned, it will heal for 1/8 of its maximum HP after each turn rather than taking damage.  This includes bad poison.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est empoisonné, il regagne des PV\nau lieu d’en perdre.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Peut empoisonner l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
longDescription.fr: Peut empoisonner l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Pokémon poisoned by Pecharunt's moves will also become confused.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque Pêchaminus empoisonne un Pokémon grâce\nà l’une de ses capacités, ce dernier devient également\nconfus.

longDescription.en: When a Pokémon is poisoned by any of Pecharunt's moves, it will also become confused.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque Pêchaminus empoisonne un Pokémon grâce\nà l’une de ses capacités, ce dernier devient également\nconfus.

shortDescription.en: Has a 30% chance of poisoning target Pokémon upon contact.
shortDescription.fr: Peut empoisonner l’ennemi par simple contact.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning the target with each hit.

This counts as an extra effect for the purposes of shield dust.  This ability takes effect before mummy.
longDescription.fr: Peut empoisonner l’ennemi par simple contact.

shortDescription.en: Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon perd la moitié de ses PV,\nses Cellules se rassemblent pour l’encourager,\nce qui lui permet de prendre sa Forme Parfaite.

longDescription.en:
Transforms 10% or 50% Zygarde into Complete Forme when its HP is below 50%.

This ability cannot be copied or replaced.  This ability only takes effect for Zygarde.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon perd la moitié de ses PV,\nses Cellules se rassemblent pour l’encourager,\nce qui lui permet de prendre sa Forme Parfaite.

shortDescription.en: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon acquiert le talent d’un allié mis K.O.

longDescription.en: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon acquiert le talent d’un allié mis K.O.

shortDescription.en: Just being next to the Pokémon powers up moves.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités des Pokémon\nqui se trouvent à proximité.

longDescription.en: "The power of moves used by the allies of the Pokémon with Power Spot is increased by 30%."
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités des Pokémon\nqui se trouvent à proximité.

shortDescription.en: Raises non-damaging moves' priority by one stage.
shortDescription.fr: Rend les capacités de statut du Pokémon prioritaires.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by one stage.
longDescription.fr: Rend les capacités de statut du Pokémon prioritaires.

shortDescription.en: Increases the PP cost of moves targetting the Pokémon by one.
shortDescription.fr: Met la pression à l’adversaire pour le forcer\nà dépenser plus de PP.

longDescription.en:
Moves targetting this Pokémon use one extra PP.

This ability stacks if multiple targets have it.  This ability still affects moves that fail or miss.  This ability does not affect ally moves that target either the entire field or just its side, nor this Pokémon's self-targetted moves; it does, however, affect single-targetted ally moves aimed at this Pokémon, ally moves that target all other Pokémon, and opponents' moves that target the entire field.  If this ability raises a move's PP cost above its remaining PP, it will use all remaining PP.

When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
longDescription.fr: Met la pression à l’adversaire pour le forcer\nà dépenser plus de PP.

shortDescription.en: Creates heavy rain, which has all the properties of Rain Dance, cannot be replaced, and causes damaging Fire moves to fail.
shortDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour neutraliser\nles attaques de type Feu.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle or gains this ability, the weather becomes heavy rain.  Heavy rain has all the properties of rain dance and also causes damaging Fire moves to fail.

Heavy rain ends when this Pokémon leaves battle or loses this ability, or when this ability is nullified.  The weather cannot otherwise be changed except by the effects of delta stream and desolate land.

air lock and cloud nine will prevent the effects of heavy rain, including allowing Fire moves to work, but will not allow the weather to be changed.
longDescription.fr: Altère les conditions météo pour neutraliser\nles attaques de type Feu.

shortDescription.en: Reduces super-effective damage to 0.75×.
shortDescription.fr: Diminue la puissance des attaques super efficaces\nsubies.

longDescription.en:
Super-effective damage this Pokémon takes is reduced to 0.75×.

This Ability is not bypassed by mold breaker, teravolt, or turboblaze.
longDescription.fr: Diminue la puissance des attaques super efficaces\nsubies.

shortDescription.en: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
shortDescription.fr: Permet d’ignorer l’effet des capacités ou des talents qui\nattirent les capacités.

longDescription.en: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.
longDescription.fr: Permet d’ignorer l’effet des capacités ou des talents qui\nattirent les capacités.

shortDescription.en: Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type de la capacité qu’il utilise.\nCe talent ne peut se déclencher qu’une fois par entrée\nau combat du Pokémon.

longDescription.en:
Changes the bearer's type to match each move it uses.

The type change takes place just before the move is used.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend le type de la capacité qu’il utilise.\nCe talent ne peut se déclencher qu’une fois par entrée\nau combat du Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Raises highest stat in harsh sunlight, or if holding Booster Energy.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le soleil brille ou que le Pokémon tient\nune capsule d’Énergie Booster, sa stat la plus élevée\naugmente.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat in harsh sunlight or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.
longDescription.fr: Quand le soleil brille ou que le Pokémon tient\nune capsule d’Énergie Booster, sa stat la plus élevée\naugmente.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ psychique au moment\noù il entre au combat.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon enters battle, it changes the terrain to psychic terrain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ psychique au moment\noù il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Boosts sound-based moves and halves damage from the same moves.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités basées sur le son.\nLe Pokémon ne subit que la moitié des dégâts quand\nil est touché par ce genre de capacités.

longDescription.en: Boosts the power of sound-based moves. The Pokémon also takes half the damage from these kinds of moves.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités basées sur le son.\nLe Pokémon ne subit que la moitié des dégâts quand\nil est touché par ce genre de capacités.

shortDescription.en: Doubles Attack in battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon utilise sa maîtrise du yoga pour doubler\nla puissance de ses attaques physiques.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Attack is doubled in battle.

This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

This ability functions identically to huge power.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon utilise sa maîtrise du yoga pour doubler\nla puissance de ses attaques physiques.

shortDescription.en: Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le sel pur immunise le Pokémon contre les altérations\nde statut, et diminue de moitié les dégâts des capacités\nde type Spectre.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon’s pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.
longDescription.fr: Le sel pur immunise le Pokémon contre les altérations\nde statut, et diminue de moitié les dégâts des capacités\nde type Spectre.

shortDescription.en: Raises highest stat on Electric Terrain, or if holding Booster Energy.
shortDescription.fr: Quand un champ électrifié est actif ou que le Pokémon\ntient une capsule d’Énergie Booster, sa stat la plus élevée\naugmente.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s most proficient stat on Electric Terrain or if the Pokémon is holding Booster Energy.
longDescription.fr: Quand un champ électrifié est actif ou que le Pokémon\ntient une capsule d’Énergie Booster, sa stat la plus élevée\naugmente.

shortDescription.en: Opposing Pokémon cannot use priority attacks.
shortDescription.fr: L’adversaire est impressionné par la majesté\ndu Pokémon, ce qui l’empêche de viser ce dernier\net ses alliés avec une capacité prioritaire.

longDescription.en: When an opposing Pokémon attempts to use a move that targets this Pokémon or an ally, and that move has priority, it will fail.
longDescription.fr: L’adversaire est impressionné par la majesté\ndu Pokémon, ce qui l’empêche de viser ce dernier\net ses alliés avec une capacité prioritaire.

shortDescription.en: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.
shortDescription.fr: Permet parfois au Pokémon d’agir en premier.

longDescription.en: If a Pokémon with this Ability selects a damaging move, it has a 30% chance of going first in its priority bracket.
longDescription.fr: Permet parfois au Pokémon d’agir en premier.

shortDescription.en: Increases Speed to 1.5× with a major status ailment.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon en cas d'altération de statut.

longDescription.en:
Whenever this Pokémon has a major status ailment, it has 1.5× its Speed.  This Pokémon is not affected by the usual Speed cut from paralysis.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon en cas d'altération de statut.

shortDescription.en: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon récupère progressivement des PV lorsqu'il pleut.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during rain.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon récupère progressivement des PV lorsqu'il pleut.

shortDescription.en: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par le talent Intimidation ou\nune attaque de type Ténèbres, Spectre ou Insecte,\nsa phobie se révèle et sa Vitesse augmente.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's Speed rises one stage with each hit from a damaging dark-, ghost-, or bug-type move.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par le talent Intimidation ou\nune attaque de type Ténèbres, Spectre ou Insecte,\nsa phobie se révèle et sa Vitesse augmente.

shortDescription.en: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon reçoit le talent d’un allié mis K.O.

longDescription.en: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon reçoit le talent d’un allié mis K.O.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens recoil moves to 1.2× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités occasionnant un contrecoup.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's recoil moves and crash moves have 1.2× their base power.

struggle is unaffected.

The "crash moves" are the moves that damage the user upon missing: jump kick and high jump kick.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités occasionnant un contrecoup.

shortDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal moves into ice moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Glace.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

longDescription.en: Turns the bearer's normal-type moves into ice-type moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités de type Normal deviennent de type Glace.\nLeur puissance augmente légèrement.

shortDescription.en: Heals for 1/3 max HP upon switching out.
shortDescription.fr: Restaure un peu de PV si le Pokémon est retiré\ndu combat.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon regains 1/3 of its maximum HP when it is switched out for another Pokémon under any circumstances other than having fainted.

This ability does not take effect when a battle ends.
longDescription.fr: Restaure un peu de PV si le Pokémon est retiré\ndu combat.

shortDescription.en: Doubles the effect of berries.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon fait mûrir la Baie qu’il tient\net double ainsi son effet.

longDescription.en: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon fait mûrir la Baie qu’il tient\net double ainsi son effet.

shortDescription.en: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon déteste la concurrence et inflige plus de dégâts si sa cible est du même sexe. Par contre, il en inflige moins si sa cible est du sexe opposé.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon inflicts 1.25× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the same gender and 0.75× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the opposite gender.

If either Pokémon is genderless, damage is unaffected.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon déteste la concurrence et inflige plus de dégâts si sa cible est du même sexe. Par contre, il en inflige moins si sa cible est du sexe opposé.

shortDescription.en: Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.
shortDescription.fr: Change le type du Pokémon en fonction\nde la ROM équipée.

longDescription.en:
Changes this Pokémon's type to match its held Memory.

This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Silvally.
longDescription.fr: Change le type du Pokémon en fonction\nde la ROM équipée.

shortDescription.en: Protects against recoil damage.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon peut utiliser des capacités occasionnant un contrecoup sans perdre de PV.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon does not receive recoil damage from its recoil moves.

struggle's recoil is unaffected.  This ability does not prevent crash damage from missing with jump kick or high jump kick.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon peut utiliser des capacités occasionnant un contrecoup sans perdre de PV.

shortDescription.en: Powers up Rock-type moves.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Roche.

longDescription.en: Increases the power of Rock-type moves used by this Pokémon by 50%.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de type Roche.

shortDescription.en: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Blesse l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user takes 1/8 of its maximum HP in damage.

This ability functions identically to iron barbs.
longDescription.fr: Blesse l'attaquant lorsque le Pokémon subit une attaque directe.

shortDescription.en: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
shortDescription.fr: Permet de fuir n'importe quel Pokémon sauvage.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.
longDescription.fr: Permet de fuir n'importe quel Pokémon sauvage.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens rock, ground, and steel moves to 1.3× their power during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de types Roche,\nSol et Acier en cas de tempête de sable.

longDescription.en: During a sandstorm, this Pokémon's rock-, ground-, and steel-type moves have 1.3× their base power.  This Pokémon does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités de types Roche,\nSol et Acier en cas de tempête de sable.

shortDescription.en: Doubles Speed during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse lors des tempêtes de sable.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon's Speed is doubled during a sandstorm, and it does not take sandstorm damage, regardless of type.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse lors des tempêtes de sable.

shortDescription.en: Creates a sandstorm when hit by an attack.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon déclenche une tempête de sable\nquand il subit une attaque.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon déclenche une tempête de sable\nquand il subit une attaque.

shortDescription.en: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque une tempête de sable\nquand il entre au combat.

longDescription.en:
The weather changes to a sandstorm when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokémon with this ability, drizzle, drought, or snow warning are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokémon will stay.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque une tempête de sable\nquand il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Increases evasion to 1.25× during a sandstorm.  Protects against sandstorm damage.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l'Esquive du Pokémon lors des tempêtes de sable.

longDescription.en:
During a sandstorm, this Pokémon has 1.25× its evasion, and it does not take sandstorm damage regardless of type.

The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in a sandstorm.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l'Esquive du Pokémon lors des tempêtes de sable.

shortDescription.en: Absorbs grass moves, raising Attack one stage.
shortDescription.fr: Annule les attaques de type Plante subies\npar le Pokémon et augmente son Attaque.

longDescription.en: Whenever a grass-type move hits this Pokémon, its Attack rises one stage, negating any other effect on it.
longDescription.fr: Annule les attaques de type Plante subies\npar le Pokémon et augmente son Attaque.

shortDescription.en: Wishiwashi becomes Schooling Form when its HP is 25% or higher.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon se rassemble avec ses congénères\nquand ses PV sont élevés. Quand il ne lui reste\nplus beaucoup de PV, le banc se disperse.

longDescription.en:
If this Pokémon is a wishiwashi and level 20 or above, then when it enters battle and at the start of each turn, it becomes Schooling Form if its HP is 25% or higher and Solo Form otherwise.

This ability cannot be replaced, copied, or nullified.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon se rassemble avec ses congénères\nquand ses PV sont élevés. Quand il ne lui reste\nplus beaucoup de PV, le banc se disperse.

shortDescription.en: Lets the Pokémon's normal and fighting moves hit ghost Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Permet aux capacités de type Normal ou Combat du Pokémon de toucher les Pokémon de type Spectre. Immunise aussi contre le talent Intimidation.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon ignores ghost-type Pokémon's immunity to normal- and fighting-type moves.

Ghost Pokémon's other types affect damage as usual.
longDescription.fr: Permet aux capacités de type Normal ou Combat du Pokémon de toucher les Pokémon de type Spectre. Immunise aussi contre le talent Intimidation.

shortDescription.en: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon entre au combat, les effets de\nMur Lumière, Protection et Voile Aurore disparaissent\npour les alliés comme pour les adversaires.

longDescription.en: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon entre au combat, les effets de\nMur Lumière, Protection et Voile Aurore disparaissent\npour les alliés comme pour les adversaires.

shortDescription.en: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ herbu quand\nil subit une attaque.

longDescription.en: Turns the ground into Grassy Terrain when the Pokémon is hit by an attack.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon crée un champ herbu quand\nil subit une attaque.

shortDescription.en: Doubles the chance of moves' extra effects occurring.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente les chances d'infliger des effets additionnels.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves have twice their usual effect chance.

An effect chance is a move's chance to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect.  For example, flamethrower's chance of burning the target is doubled, but protect's chance of success and air cutter's increased critical hit rate are unaffected.

secret power is unaffected.
longDescription.fr: Augmente les chances d'infliger des effets additionnels.

shortDescription.en: When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage from moves is halved.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon subit moins de dégâts quand ses PV\nsont au maximum.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon has full HP, regular damage (not fixed damage!) from moves is halved.

This ability cannot be nullified.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon subit moins de dégâts quand ses PV\nsont au maximum.

shortDescription.en: Prevents opponents from fleeing or switching out.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche les Pokémon ennemis de quitter le terrain.

longDescription.en:
While this Pokémon is in battle, opposing Pokémon cannot flee or switch out.

Other Pokémon with this ability are unaffected.  Pokémon with run away can still flee.  Pokémon can still switch out with the use of a move or item.
longDescription.fr: Empêche les Pokémon ennemis de quitter le terrain.

shortDescription.en: Powers up slicing moves.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités tranchantes.

longDescription.en: Increases the power of all 'slicing' moves by 50%.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la puissance des capacités tranchantes.

shortDescription.en: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon soigne parfois ses altérations de statut en muant.

longDescription.en: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to have its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon soigne parfois ses altérations de statut en muant.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités ayant un effet additionnel le perdent,\nmais leur puissance augmente.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves with extra effects have 1.3× their power, but lose their extra effects.

An effect chance is a move's chance to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect. For example, thunder shock's paralysis is an extra effect, but thunder wave's is not, nor are knock off's item removal and air cutter's increased critical hit rate.

Moves that lower the user's stats are unaffected.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités ayant un effet additionnel le perdent,\nmais leur puissance augmente.

shortDescription.en: Protects against critical hits.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé des coups critiques par sa carapace.

longDescription.en:
Moves cannot score critical hits against this Pokémon.

This ability functions identically to battle armor.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon est protégé des coups critiques par sa carapace.

shortDescription.en: Protects against incoming moves' extra effects.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon dispose d'un écran naturel qui le protège des effets additionnels des attaques ennemies.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is immune to the extra effects of moves used against it.

An extra effect is a move's chance, listed as an "effect chance", to inflict a status ailment, cause a stat change, or make the target flinch in addition to the move's main effect.  For example, thunder shock's paralysis is an extra effect, but thunder wave's is not, nor are knock off's item removal and air cutter's increased critical hit rate.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon dispose d'un écran naturel qui le protège des effets additionnels des attaques ennemies.

shortDescription.en: Transforms this Minior between Core Form and Meteor Form.  Prevents major status ailments and drowsiness while in Meteor Form.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon perd la moitié de ses PV,\nson enveloppe se brise et il adopte une posture\noffensive.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon enters battle and at the end of each turn, if its HP is 50% or above, it changes into Meteor Form; otherwise, it changes into Core Form.  In Meteor Form, it cannot be given a major status ailment (though existing ones are not cured), cannot become drowsy from yawn, and cannot use rest (which will simply fail).

This ability cannot be copied, replaced, or nullified.  This ability only takes effect for Minior.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon perd la moitié de ses PV,\nson enveloppe se brise et il adopte une posture\noffensive.

shortDescription.en: Doubles the Pokémon's stat modifiers.  These doubled modifiers are still capped at -6 or 6 stages.
shortDescription.fr: Les changements de stats sont deux fois plus importants\npour le Pokémon.

longDescription.en:
Each stage of this Pokémon's stat modifiers acts as two stages.  These doubled stages are still limited to a minimum of -6 and a maximum of 6.

This Pokémon can still accumulate less than -3 or more than 3 stages of stat modifiers, even though the extra ones have no effect after doubling.
longDescription.fr: Les changements de stats sont deux fois plus importants\npour le Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Extends two-to-five-hit moves and triple kick to their full length every time.
shortDescription.fr: Les capacités pouvant frapper plusieurs fois frappent\ntoujours le nombre maximal de coups.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon always hits five times with two-to-five-hit moves, such as icicle spear.  It also bypasses the accuracy checks on triple kick's second and third hits.
longDescription.fr: Les capacités pouvant frapper plusieurs fois frappent\ntoujours le nombre maximal de coups.

shortDescription.en: Halves Attack and Speed for five turns upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Divise la Vitesse et l’Attaque du Pokémon par deux\npendant les cinq premiers tours du combat.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's Attack and Speed are halved for five turns upon entering battle.

This ability also takes effect when acquired during battle.  If this Pokémon loses its ability before the five turns are up, its Attack and Speed return to normal; if it then regains this ability without leaving battle, its Attack and Speed are halved again, but the counter keeps counting from where it was.
longDescription.fr: Divise la Vitesse et l’Attaque du Pokémon par deux\npendant les cinq premiers tours du combat.

shortDescription.en: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon quand il neige.

longDescription.en: During Hail, this Pokémon has double Speed.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon quand il neige.

shortDescription.en: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon porte un coup critique, les dégâts\ninfligés augmentent encore plus que d’habitude.

longDescription.en: This Pokémon inflicts triple damage with critical hits, rather than the usual double damage.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon porte un coup critique, les dégâts\ninfligés augmentent encore plus que d’habitude.

shortDescription.en: Increases evasion to 1.25× during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente l'Esquive du Pokémon quand il neige.

longDescription.en:
During hail, this Pokémon has 1.25× its evasion, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.

The evasion bonus does not count as a stat modifier.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved in snow.
longDescription.fr: Augmente l'Esquive du Pokémon quand il neige.

shortDescription.en: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque la neige quand il entre au combat.

longDescription.en:
The weather changes to hail when this Pokémon enters battle and does not end unless cancelled by another weather condition.

If multiple Pokémon with this ability, drizzle, drought, or sand stream are sent out at the same time, the abilities will activate in order of Speed, respecting trick room.  Each ability's weather will cancel the previous weather, and only the weather summoned by the slowest of the Pokémon will stay.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon invoque la neige quand il entre au combat.

shortDescription.en: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon ignore les talents adverses qui auraient\nun effet sur ses capacités.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon's moves completely ignore abilities that could hinder or prevent their effect on the target.

For example, this Pokémon's moves ignore abilities that would fully negate them, such as water absorb; abilities that would prevent any of their effects, such as clear body, shell armor, or sticky hold; and abilities that grant any general protective benefit, such as simple, snow cloak, or thick fat.  If an ability could either hinder or help this Pokémon's moves, e.g. dry skin or unaware, the ability is ignored either way.

Abilities that do not fit this description, even if they could hinder moves in some other way, are not affected.  For example, cursed body only affects potential future uses of the move, while liquid ooze and shadow tag can only hinder a move's effect on the user.  This ablity cannot ignore type or form changes granted by abilities, for example color change or forecast; nor effects that were caused by abilities but are no longer tied to an ability, such as the rain from drizzle.  This ability cannot ignore multitype at all.

An ability ignored by this ability is only nullified while the move is being used.  For example, this Pokémon's moves can paralyze a Pokémon with limber, but Limber will activate and heal the paralysis immediately thereafter, and this Pokémon's spikes are not affected by this ability after they have been placed.

When this Pokémon enters battle, all participating trainers are notified that it has this ability.

This ability functions identically to mold breaker and turboblaze.

shortDescription.en: Skips every second turn.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon utilise une capacité, il passe le tour suivant à paresser.

longDescription.en:
Every second turn on which this Pokémon should attempt to use a move, it will instead do nothing ("loaf around").

Loafing around interrupts moves that take multiple turns the same way paralysis, flinching, etc do.  Most such moves, for example bide or rollout, are simply cut off upon loafing around.  Attacks with a recharge turn, such as hyper beam, do not have to recharge; attacks with a preparation turn, such as fly, do not end up being used.  Moves that are forced over multiple turns and keep going through failure, such as outrage, uproar, or any move forced by encore, keep going as usual.

If this Pokémon is confused, its confusion is not checked when loafing around; the Pokémon cannot hurt itself, and its confusion does not end or come closer to ending.

If this Pokémon attempts to move but fails, e.g. because of paralysis or gravity, it still counts as having moved and will loaf around the next turn.  If it does not attempt to move, e.g. because it is asleep or frozen, whatever it would have done will be postponed until its next attempt; that is, it will either loaf around or move as usual, depending on what it last did.

This ability cannot be changed with worry seed, but it can be disabled with gastro acid, changed with role play, or traded away with skill swap.

shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon s'il perd ou utilise l'objet qu'il tenait au début du combat.

longDescription.en:
When this Pokémon uses or loses its held item, its Speed is doubled.  If it gains another item or leaves battle, this bonus is lost.

This includes when the Pokémon drops its item because of knock off.  This bonus does not count as a stat modifier.  There is no notification when this ability takes effect.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Vitesse du Pokémon s'il perd ou utilise l'objet qu'il tenait au début du combat.

shortDescription.en: Prevents opposing Pokémon from eating held Berries.
shortDescription.fr: Fait stresser l’adversaire, ce qui l’empêche de manger\ndes Baies.

longDescription.en:
Opposing Pokémon cannot eat held Berries while this Pokémon is in battle.

Affected Pokémon can still use bug bite or pluck to eat a target's Berry.
longDescription.fr: Fait stresser l’adversaire, ce qui l’empêche de manger\ndes Baies.

shortDescription.en: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore a target's protection and deal 1/4 the usual damage.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon utilise une attaque directe, celle-ci\npourra toucher la cible même si elle se protège.

longDescription.en: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon utilise une attaque directe, celle-ci\npourra toucher la cible même si elle se protège.

shortDescription.en: Lowers Special Attack of all Pokémon except itself.
shortDescription.fr: Le pouvoir de l’urne qui appelle le fléau affaiblit\nl’Attaque Spéciale de tous les autres Pokémon.

longDescription.en: The power of the Pokémon’s ruinous vessel lowers the Sp. Atk stats of all Pokémon except itself.
longDescription.fr: Le pouvoir de l’urne qui appelle le fléau affaiblit\nl’Attaque Spéciale de tous les autres Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: Increases moves' accuracy to 1.1× for friendly Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente la Précision du Pokémon et de ses alliés.

longDescription.en: All friendly Pokémon's moves, including this Pokémon's own moves, have 1.1× their usual accuracy while this Pokémon is in battle.
longDescription.fr: Augmente la Précision du Pokémon et de ses alliés.

shortDescription.en: Prevents sleep.
shortDescription.fr: Empêche le Pokémon de s'endormir.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be asleep.

This causes rest to fail altogether.  If a Pokémon is asleep and acquires this ability, it will immediately wake up; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

This ability functions identically to insomnia in battle.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
longDescription.fr: Empêche le Pokémon de s'endormir.

shortDescription.en: Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité Électrik, il ne subit aucun dégât et regagne des PV à la place.

longDescription.en:
Whenever an electric-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it.

This ability will not take effect if this Pokémon is ground-type and thus immune to Electric moves.  Electric moves will ignore this Pokémon's substitute.

This effect includes non-damaging moves, i.e. thunder wave.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité Électrik, il ne subit aucun dégât et regagne des PV à la place.

shortDescription.en: Swaps abilities with opponents on contact.
shortDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est directement touché\npar une capacité, il échange son talent avec\ncelui de l’assaillant.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.
longDescription.fr: Lorsque le Pokémon est directement touché\npar une capacité, il échange son talent avec\ncelui de l’assaillant.

shortDescription.en: Absorbs water moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité Eau, il ne subit aucun dégât et regagne des PV à la place.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a water-type move hits this Pokémon, it heals for 1/4 of its maximum HP, negating any other effect on it.

Water moves will ignore this Pokémon's substitute.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité Eau, il ne subit aucun dégât et regagne des PV à la place.

shortDescription.en: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.
shortDescription.fr: Réduit la puissance des capacités de type Feu subies\npar le Pokémon. Il est également immunisé contre\nles brûlures.

longDescription.en: When this Pokémon is hit by a Fire move, the damage is halved.  When this Pokémon uses a Water move, the power is doubled. This Pokémon cannot be burned, and if it becomes burned, the burn is immediately cured.
longDescription.fr: Réduit la puissance des capacités de type Feu subies\npar le Pokémon. Il est également immunisé contre\nles brûlures.

shortDescription.en: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.
shortDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup la Défense du Pokémon\nquand il subit une capacité de type Eau.

longDescription.en: Raises this Pokémon's Defense by two stages when it's hit by a Water move.
longDescription.fr: Augmente beaucoup la Défense du Pokémon\nquand il subit une capacité de type Eau.

shortDescription.en: Prevents burns.
shortDescription.fr: Le voile qui recouvre le Pokémon le protège\ndes brûlures.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot be burned.

If a Pokémon is burned and acquires this ability, its burn is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.
longDescription.fr: Le voile qui recouvre le Pokémon le protège\ndes brûlures.

shortDescription.en: Raises Speed and lowers Defense by one stage each upon being hit by a physical move.
shortDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une capacité\nphysique, sa Défense baisse mais sa Vitesse\naugmente beaucoup.

longDescription.en:
Whenever a physical move hits this Pokémon, its Speed rises one stage and its Defense falls one stage.

This ability triggers on every hit of a multiple-hit move.
longDescription.fr: Quand le Pokémon est touché par une capacité\nphysique, sa Défense baisse mais sa Vitesse\naugmente beaucoup.

shortDescription.en: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Feu,\nil ne subit aucun dégât et sa Défense augmente\nbeaucoup.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité de type Feu,\nil ne subit aucun dégât et sa Défense augmente\nbeaucoup.

shortDescription.en: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
shortDescription.fr: Un écran de fumée empêche l’adversaire de baisser\nles stats du Pokémon.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon.

This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis; nor self-inflicted stat drops, such as the Special Attack drop from overheat; nor opponent-triggered stat boosts, such as the Attack boost from swagger.  This Pokémon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through guard swap, heart swap, or power swap.

This ability functions identically to clear body in battle.

Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the wild encounter rate is halved.
longDescription.fr: Un écran de fumée empêche l’adversaire de baisser\nles stats du Pokémon.

shortDescription.en: This Pokémon automatically switches out when its HP drops below half.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon perd confiance quand ses PV tombent\nà la moitié et s’enfuit dans sa Poké Ball.

longDescription.en: After this Pokémon is hit by a move, if that move caused this Pokémon's HP to drop below half, it switches out.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon perd confiance quand ses PV tombent\nà la moitié et s’enfuit dans sa Poké Ball.

shortDescription.en: When hit by a wind move, the power of the next Electric-type move it uses is doubled.
shortDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité faisant appel\nau vent, il se charge en électricité.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon becomes charged when it is hit by a wind move, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.
longDescription.fr: Si le Pokémon est touché par une capacité faisant appel\nau vent, il se charge en électricité.

shortDescription.en: Gives immunity to wind moves, and causes the Pokémon's Attack to increase by one stage when hit by one.
shortDescription.fr: L’Attaque du Pokémon augmente si un vent arrière souffle\nou s’il est touché par une capacité faisant appel au vent.\nDans ce dernier cas, il ne subit aucun dégât.

longDescription.en: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat if Tailwind takes effect or if the Pokémon is hit by a wind move. The Pokémon also takes no damage from wind moves.
longDescription.fr: L’Attaque du Pokémon augmente si un vent arrière souffle\nou s’il est touché par une capacité faisant appel au vent.\nDans ce dernier cas, il ne subit aucun dégât.

shortDescription.en: Protects against damaging moves that are not super effective.
shortDescription.fr: Une puissance mystérieuse protège le Pokémon contre\ntoutes les capacités, sauf celles qui sont super efficaces.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon is immune to damaging moves that are not super effective against it.

Moves that inflict fixed damage, such as night shade or seismic toss, are considered super effective if their types are.  Damage not directly dealt by moves, such as damage from weather, a status ailment, or spikes, is not prevented.

This ability cannot be copied with role play or traded away with skill swap, but it can be copied with trace, disabled with gastro acid, or changed with worry seed.  This Pokémon can still use Role Play itself to lose this ability, but not Skill Swap.

If this Pokémon has a substitute, this ability will block moves as usual and any moves not blocked will react to the Substitute as usual.
longDescription.fr: Une puissance mystérieuse protège le Pokémon contre\ntoutes les capacités, sauf celles qui sont super efficaces.

shortDescription.en: Lowers incoming non-damaging moves' base accuracy to exactly 50%.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon résiste mieux aux capacités de statut.

longDescription.en: Non-damaging moves have exactly 50% base accuracy against this Pokémon.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon résiste mieux aux capacités de statut.

shortDescription.en: Changes darmanitan's form after each turn depending on its HP: Zen Mode below 50% max HP, and Standard Mode otherwise.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon change de forme quand il lui reste moins\nde la moitié de ses PV.

longDescription.en:
This Pokémon switches between Standard Mode and Zen Mode after each turn depending on its HP.  Below 50% of its maximum HP, it switches to Zen Mode, and at 50% or above, it switches to Standard Mode.

This Pokémon returns to Standard Mode upon leaving battle or losing this ability.  This ability has no effect if this Pokémon is not a darmanitan.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon change de forme quand il lui reste moins\nde la moitié de ses PV.

shortDescription.en: Transforms into its Hero Form when switching out.
shortDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend sa Forme Super en quittant\nle combat.

longDescription.en: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.
longDescription.fr: Le Pokémon prend sa Forme Super en quittant\nle combat.
